mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_idempotency ( user_id, operation, idempotency_key, request_fingerprint, order_id, expires_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{operation}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{requestFingerprint}, #{orderId}, #{expiresAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, operation, idempotency_key, request_fingerprint, order_id, expires_at, created_at, updated_at FROM order_idempotency WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND operation = #{operation} AND idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey}
mapper.update: UPDATE order_idempotency SET order_id = #{orderId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND order_id IS NULL
